# SyncZones AI crawler policy

allow: *
site: https://synczones.app/

# Key URLs
home: https://synczones.app/
blog: https://synczones.app/blog/
overlap hub: https://synczones.app/overlap/
advertise: https://synczones.app/advertise/
tool: free timezone / time zone overlap visualizer, up to 5 zones, shareable URL, optional Save Team (localStorage)
